subject: TSL Daily — Tue, Mar 17, 2026 (missed)
html:
TSL Internal

TSL Daily — Tue, Mar 17, 2026

Meetings

No TSL meetings today.

Open Tasks

Sam:

  • Homepage redesign — new layout (Queue / Network / Discover), remove Community nav
  • Funds/Networks page — NL search as primary interface, detail page improvements
  • Deck Triage — Fund 1 + Fund 2+ signals extraction, two-pager output
  • Ensure new funds can be added to Supabase with auto-generated detail pages

David:

  • Expand fund database via Shai Goldman's list (post-2017, sub-$150M)
  • NYC event co-host with Stifel
  • GTM / content

Suggested Priorities for Tomorrow

  1. product [Sam] Homepage redesign — get the new layout to a shippable state. It's the unlock for deck triage UX.
  2. product [Sam] Start deck triage signal extraction (Fund 1 signals first — check size vs fund size, thesis-background fit).
  3. gtm [David] Shai Goldman fund list — get this into CSV so it can be loaded. Data quality is what makes triage useful.

Note: Digest missed yesterday due to a pipeline error — fixed going forward.
